email_history.subject: Tiles for Design Unity projects
email_history.content:
Hi Warren,

I came across Design Unity's stunning residential project in Sydney and was impressed by the attention to detail and design excellence. Managing high-end design projects like that can be complex.

Sourcing high-quality, unique tiles that meet your design standards is likely a challenge. Similar architecture and design firms have benefited from working with us, as we offer a premium tile range and reliable supply. One of our clients saved time and reduced project delays after switching to us.

Would it be worth sending you our latest range and pricing to compare against what you're paying now?

Admin

Macktiles Australia

settings.company_description: Macktiles Australia is a tile manufacturing company specialising in the production of high-quality ceramic and porcelain tiles for residential and commercial applications. With a strong focus on design innovation, durability, and compliance with Australian standards, Macktiles combines advanced manufacturing processes with global design trends to deliver consistent, premium tile solutions for the construction and interior design industry.
settings.value_proposition: Macktiles Australia provides builders, developers, and designers with directly manufactured tile solutions, ensuring consistent quality, competitive pricing, and reliable supply at scale. By controlling production, Macktiles reduces lead times, minimises supply chain disruptions, and enables greater flexibility in design and project-specific requirements.
settings.social_proof: Macktiles Australia products are used across a wide range of residential developments, commercial projects, and large-scale construction works. Known for consistent manufacturing quality and dependable supply, Macktiles has built strong relationships with builders, contractors, and project developers who rely on its products for timely and high-standard project delivery.
